entries.content: plural noun ① (merchandise) 商品 shāngpǐn▸ goods and services 商品与服务▸ electrical goods 电器▸ to be caught with the goods 人赃俱获 ② (property) 财产 cáichǎn▸ all my worldly goods 我的一切财产▸ goods and chattels 全部动产 ③ British Railways 运载的货物 yùnzài de huòwù ④ figurative informal (desirable thing) 合意的东西 héyì de dōngxi▸ she's the goods British 她妩媚动人▸ he's got the goods 他有真本领▸ to deliver/come up with the goods 不负所望
entries.name: plural noun
